# DevCode Identity + Sift for iGaming: Real-Time Player Risk Intelligence

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Through a partnership between Sift and DevCode Identity, iGaming operators gain a unified view of player risk across the full lifecycle, from signup to deposit, wagering, and withdrawal. DevCode Identity KYC, AML, and compliance workflows while Sift delivers real-time behavioral and payment risk intelligence, helping teams reduce unnecessary friction, fast-track trusted players, and protect revenue with smarter risk decisions.

**Key benefits:**

*   **Increase player conversion:** Identify trusted players faster and streamline onboarding and payments
    
*   **Reduce operational costs:** Limit costly KYC checks, ID verification, and manual reviews to higher-risk players
    
*   **Unify risk insights:** Combine identity, device, payment, and behavioral signals across the entire player journey
    
*   **Deploy quickly:** Pre-built integrations enable faster implementation with minimal engineering lift
    

### Get the DevCode Identity + Sift Guide

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
